name: Tech-Curious Couple
description: Mid-30s software engineers exploring the Valley's innovation ecosystem. They want Instagram-worthy moments mixed with insider startup conversations and farm-to-table dining.

name: Honeymoon Adventure Couple
description: Just-married newlyweds seeking an action-packed California romance: hiking redwoods, wine country weekends, beach sunsets. Peak energy, premium budget, no expense spared on memories.

name: Anniversary Wine Couple
description: Married 25+ years, celebrating with Napa tastings and upscale dining. They know wine, want exclusive experiences, and appreciate quiet luxury over Instagram theatrics.

name: Budget Couple Road Trip
description: Early-20s couple on a gap year, road-tripping down the coast. Hostels, street tacos, and hiking are the itinerary. Adventure over comfort, experiences over amenities.

name: Remote Work Couple
description: Laptop lifestyle: they're working Monday-Friday from a nice hotel, exploring after 5pm and weekends. Need reliable WiFi, quiet work spaces, and location-independent flexibility.

name: Young Family Outdoorsy
description: Parents + 2 kids (6-12), weekend warriors. Redwoods, tide pools, and hiking trails over museums. They want family-friendly dining, kid-proof accommodations, and someone to wrangle the chaos.

name: Multigenerational Bay Family
description: Grandparents, parents, teens, toddlers all together for a reunion. Wide age range demands accessibility, family dining, and enough space for everyone. Relaxed coordination over tight scheduling.

name: Newborn Parents Getaway
description: New parents with an infant (0-5), desperately seeking a nearby escape. Hotels must have quiet rooms, room service, and nearby pediatricians. A break from grandma's house.

name: Homeschool Family STEM
description: Educated parents homeschooling 3+ kids, using Bay Area as a living classroom. Tech museums, biotech tours, and Stanford campus walks. Educational AND fun.

name: Kosher Orthodox Family
description: Family with 3+ kids (ages mixed), strict kosher dietary laws, Shabbat observance. Need hotels near shul, certified kosher restaurants, and respect for religious scheduling.

name: Halal Family Foodie
description: Family exploring Bay Area's diverse halal dining scene while introducing kids to culture. Seeking restaurants, markets, and experiences that honor their faith and taste preferences.

name: Digital Nomad Solo
description: 23-30yo freelancer/remote worker treating Bay Area as a 1-month work-travel base. Fast WiFi, coworking access, and vibrant cafe culture are non-negotiable. Cheap accommodations welcome.

name: Solo Woman Nature Retreat
description: Woman in her 40s taking solo time for self-discovery. Yoga retreats, hiking, journaling by Big Sur, meditation. Safety and empowering experiences matter most.

name: Business Traveler Executive
description: 40s executive visiting Sand Hill Road, investor meetings, board dinners. Frequent flyer, expense account, needs seamless logistics. In-room dining, gym, and premium connectivity.

name: Conference Attendee Networking
description: 30s professional at AWS Summit or similar, 3 days of sessions + evening networking. Budget-conscious (company pays), wants to maximize connections and learn. Walkable hotel near venue.

name: Sales Rep Wine Region
description: 45yo B2B sales rep with 4 days of client meetings in Sonoma. Fancy dinners, golf, wine tastings. Works hard, plays harder. Wants upscale but approachable experiences.

name: Startup Founder Pitch Tour
description: 28yo founder on a 2-week VC pitch tour, living lean but aiming high. Coffee meetings, pitch decks, hustle. Wants cheap hotel + premium networking spaces. Energy fueled by caffeine and ambition.

name: Bachelorette Party Crew
description: 8-12 women, mid-20s to 40s, one bride-to-be. San Francisco wine crawl, rooftop bars, themed dinners. Instagram moments essential. Group energy is high, chaos is expected.

name: College Reunion Crew
description: 6 college friends, now 35-45, reuniting annually. Catching up, reminiscing, sampling local craft beer. Mid-range comfort, group dinners, late-night talks. Authenticity over Instagram.

name: Hiking Buddies Adventure
description: 4-5 fit 30-40somethings meeting up for weekend hiking. Redwoods, Point Reyes, Big Sur. Early starts, long days, basic lodging acceptable. Trail tales and summit views the goal.

name: Luxury Friend Getaway
description: 3-4 high-earning women, late 40s+, spa weekend. Pampering, wine, gourmet meals, no compromises. Each person brings clout and expectation of white-glove service.

name: Wedding Guest Casual
description: Solo or plus-one attending a friend's weekend wedding in Sonoma. Ceremony, reception, and maybe a breakfast after. Out-of-towner seeking atmosphere, not hassle.

name: Wedding Party Weekend
description: Bridesmaids/groomsmen, rehearsal dinner, ceremony, and dancing till dawn. Photos, coordinated outfits, inside jokes. Mid-range comfort for group of 6-8, easy access to event venue.

name: Graduation Family Celebration
description: Parents + extended family celebrating grad's milestone. Fancy dinner, family photos, emotional milestones. 2-3 days, mid-to-premium budget, everyone in good spirits.

name: Sports Fan Game Weekend
description: Warriors/49ers fan traveling for playoff game or rivalry match. Friday night arrival, game Saturday, tailgating, postgame bars. Budget-conscious, energized by crowd.

name: Music Festival Campers
description: 4-6 friends attending Outside Lands or similar, camping or budget hotel. Sees hotel as a crash pad between sets. Adventure spirit, high energy, no frills needed.

name: Retired Wine Couple
description: Couple in their 60s+, retired professionals, wine country enthusiasts. Napa/Sonoma for tastings and fine dining. Appreciate quiet luxury, knowledgeable staff, and no rushing.

name: Wheelchair Accessible Traveler
description: Solo or partnered, wheelchair user or mobility-limited, seeking barrier-free experiences. Accessible hotels, ramps, parking, and staff trained in inclusive service. Refuses to compromise on activity.

name: Vision Impaired Adventure
description: Traveler with low/no vision, seeking sensory-rich experiences (food, music, touch). Restaurants with audio descriptions, guided tours, accessible venues. Thrives with accommodation and curiosity.

name: Elderly Caregiver Couple
description: One partner is 75+, uses cane or walker; other is dedicated caregiver. Need ground-floor rooms, handrails, nearby medical facilities. Relaxed pace, low energy, comfort over adventure.

name: Celiac Foodie Explorer
description: Gluten-free traveler who refuses to skip dining experiences. Researches restaurants obsessively, needs certified kitchens, communicates medical necessity. Food is life, just without gluten.

name: Severe Allergy Family
description: Family (2 adults, 1-2 kids with peanut/tree nut allergies) seeking safe dining. Pre-calls restaurants, needs EpiPens nearby, reads labels. Peace of mind over spontaneity.

name: Diabetic Wellness Traveler
description: Type 1/2 diabetic managing blood sugar while enjoying Bay Area. Needs access to pharmacies, balanced menus, time for meal prep. Exercise and diet intentional, not accidental.

name: Japanese Business Delegation
description: Group of 5-8 Japanese executives visiting tech companies, trade shows. Formal dress, scheduled itineraries, interpreter present. Prefer Japanese-speaking staff, Asian cuisine, structured experiences.

name: Brazilian Family Visit
description: Family from São Paulo visiting relatives in Bay Area. Portuguese speakers, warm and social. Extended family reunions, Brazilian restaurants, homesick for tropical weather.

name: Mandarin-Speaking Seniors
description: Retired Chinese couple (60s+) visiting grandchildren in Silicon Valley. Prefer Mandarin-speaking staff, Chinese restaurants, familiar food. Limited English, comfortable with visual navigation.

name: Instagram Influencer Creator
description: 20-35yo content creator (50k+ followers) touring Bay Area landmarks, cafes, hotels. Every meal is a photoshoot, location scouting, sponsored content. Wants photogenic, trending spots.

name: Film Festival Critic
description: Indie film enthusiast attending Tribeca or SXSW overflow events. Film screenings, director Q&As, hipster cafes. Cultured, conversational, mid-budget. Wants artistic community.

name: Luxury Spa Retreat Solo
description: High-net-worth individual 50+, seeking 5-star spa treatments, private yoga, gourmet meals. Silence, wellness, zero children, concierge availability. Money is no object, time is precious.

name: Van Lifer Couple
description: Couple living in converted van, parked near Bay Area for a few weeks. Boondocking, free wifi hunting, camping stove meals. Ultra-budget, high freedom, low environmental impact.

name: Queer Pride Celebration
description: LGBTQ+ friend group (4-6 people) attending SF Pride or weekend pride celebration. Fun, affirming spaces, rainbow-flagged hotels, authentic expression. Community over convention.

name: Academic Conference Researcher
description: PhD student or postdoc attending computer science or AI conference. Budget airline, modest hotel, university per diem. Networking, poster sessions, free wine. Intellectual energy high.

name: Luxury Girls Weekend
description: 3-4 professional women (35-50) escaping spouses/kids for champagne, spa, Michelin stars. San Francisco luxury, fine hotels, sommelier recommendations. Weekend of indulgence.

name: Teen Service Trip
description: Church/school group of 12-15 teenagers on a service-learning trip. Community work, team bonding, structured activities. Leaders present. Budget-conscious, educational focus.

name: Medical Tourism Patient
description: International patient visiting UCSF/Stanford for surgery/treatment, staying 2-3 weeks. Needs accessible room, pharmacy access, quiet recovery space, family accommodations.

name: Ultra-Wealthy Family Concierge
description: UHNW family (parents + 2-3 kids) with private security, personal shopper, chef. Five-star only, helicopter-accessible, white-glove everything. Staff trained for discretion and perfection.

name: Budget Student Explorer
description: College student on summer break, minimal budget, maximum wanderlust. Hostels, street food, free walking tours. Social, adventurous, wants authentic local experiences.

name: Eco-Conscious Family
description: Family of 4 (2 kids 6-12) prioritizing sustainable tourism. Carbon-neutral accommodations, local farms, public transit only. Teaching kids environmental responsibility through travel.

name: Cross-Country Road Tripper
description: Solo traveler on a month-long cross-country road trip, Bay Area is a pit stop. Lives out of car, budget motel, earthy vibes. Road stories and new friends the real destination.

name: Remote Startup Offsite
description: 15-person tech startup team gathering for quarterly in-person. Workshops, team bonding, brainstorming, happy hours. Company pays, group efficiency important. WiFi and breakout rooms essential.
